subcodes.first_line: O my God, my Succour, my Companion, and my Deliverer! Thou knowest that a dark calamity and a blind affliction have befallen [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی و مغیثی و انیسی و مجیری انک لتعلم قد وقعت مصیبه دهماء و رزیه عمیاء و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @consolation and comfort
